title: hyprtrdr.io
description: A full-stack web application for day traders featuring live stock scanners with alerts, charts, news feeds, pattern recognition, and performance analysis.
results: Launched with 0 subscribers and grew active subscriber base to 217 users in 30 days.
Reduced build pipeline time from 18 mintues to 7 minutes by developing a multi-agent workflow.
Improved conversion rate from 0.28% to 0.97% by split testing marketing pages.

title: 11ty Blog Template
description: An agent-ready blog template built using Eleventy SSG, Tailwind, and Bun.
results: Decreased frontend JS bundle size by 32% across production micro-frontends by eliminating runtime CSS injections.
Improved Core Web Vitals, reducing Interaction to Next Paint (INP) by 45ms and Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) by 250ms.
Integrated a custom static analysis parser that detects and purges 100% of unused utility declarations at build time.

title: 11ty Blog Tutorial (feat. AI)
description: A full docs-style guide and tutorial to building out a blog using 11ty, Bun, and Tailwind. Featuring helpful skills and prompts for agentic assistance.
results: Achieved sub-30ms local state update latency and robust conflict resolution for up to 100 concurrent editors per workspace.
Designed a custom delta-compression protocol that minimized WebSocket packet payload size by 75%.
Implemented a secure local-first offline fallback using IndexedDB, enabling seamless reconnection and automated reconciliation.
